title: calamus lauterbachii
intro: Calamus lauterbachii, also known as the lesser calamus or calamus, is a type of rhizome plant native to the tropical forests of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of calamus lauterbachii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems and anxiety. Herbal preparations of calamus lauterbachii are often made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
